case_title: BRUCE KRELL VS. WILLIAM HUFFMAN et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KRELL, BRUCE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HUFFMAN, WILLIAM CLOUDE, DAVID THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1645 FOLSOM ST. #6, S.F. CA. 94103, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT HUFFMAN, WILLIAM CLOUDE, DAVID
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KRELL, BRUCE SERVED JUN-24-2002, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CLOUDE, DAVID
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KRELL, BRUCE SERVED JUN-24-2002, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT HUFFMAN, WILLIAM
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED AS TO DEFENDANT HUFFMAN, WILLIAM CLOUDE, DAVID
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT HUFFMAN, WILLIAM CLOUDE, DAVID

ORIGINAL SUMMONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF KRELL, BRUCE AS TO DEFENDANT CLOUDE, DAVID
